import json

    kevs = any(f.get('kev') for f in item['fixes'])
    print(f\"{i}: action={item['action']} target={tp['name']}@{tp['version']} manifest={item.get('manifest_path')} rec={item.get('recommended_version')} sevs={sevs} kev={kevs} n_fixes={len(item['fixes'])}\")
"
